programme.title: E86
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E3 - Pascale Roy Lafontaine, Surf Guide In Hawaii
programme.desc: The guide Pascale Roy Lafontaine welcomes a group who have come to join his surf camp in Haleiwa, in the Hawaiian archipelago. The perfect opportunity for a hike along the Kuli'ou'ou ridge and admire its spectacular panorama, all amidst the lush vegetation of a unique ecosystem.

programme.title: E12 - Maison Lafayette In Rochefort
programme.desc: Cedric and Virginie are in Rochefort to discover Maison Lafayette. This project is the result of a complete renovation carried out by Amelie, an interior designer, and Renaud, the owner. Also: Gesso, a century-old family business; Mark's house in New Zealand; crafting decorative shelves.

programme.title: E52 - The Origins Of The Expression ''se Mettre Sur Son 31''
programme.desc: Fashion, craftwork, design, beauty, cuisine, lifestyle... a round-up of the best moments from ''Tendance XXI''!

programme.title: E5 - New Passive House With A Timber Structure
programme.desc: Cedric and Virginie visit a multi level family home built with a wooden structure. A single stove heats the entire house. Also featured: the Marnay-sur-Seine priory, both an exhibition venue and guesthouse; what to consider about extensions when buying or renovating; building a wood shelter.

programme.title: E4 - Stephane Bonnat's Mexico
programme.desc: Master chocolate-maker, heir to a tradition dating back to the 18th century, Stephane Bonnat takes us to explore his lands in Mexico, source of his cocoa beans, before discovering the finished product in Voiron, Isere. From bean to bar, all you ever wanted to know about a great chocolate.

programme.desc: A kabaddi champion from Rajasthan moves to Mumbai to chase her dreams. Along the way, she reunites with her family and fights hard to earn her mother the respect she truly deserves.

programme.title: Jagadhatri E139
programme.desc: Jagaddhatri, a secret crime officer, and orphan Swayambhu partner to fight crime. Only a few friends know her real identity; later, they marry happily.

programme.desc: Lakshmi, a strong-willed woman, bravely faces pressures in a traditional joint family and stays by her husband Shriniwas, who works hard to build his dream house.

programme.title: E13 - The Thinker
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.desc: Mickey and Truman grow closer as they follow their new lead. A new victim complicates the case of the murdered women and raises the stakes in the hunt to find Kacey as Mickey reckons with her past choices.

Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

The Plot
programme.desc: Young-il is a plotter who manipulates murder-for-hire cases to look like accidents. Nobody knows those accidents are in fact perfectly plotted, planned murders. After finishing a flawlessly plotted case with no trace of evidence left behind, Young-il receives a new request. His new target is a prominent political figure who is always under the spotlight. Even with the higher risk of getting exposed, Young-il decides to take the case with his team members, Jackie, Wol-cheon, and Jeom-man. When the plot is ready after immaculate preparation and numerous rehearsals, the team finally makes its move, but some unexpected trouble threatens Young-il's perfect plan.

programme.title: My Missing Valentine (a.k.a One Second Ahead, One Second Behind)
programme.desc: Hajime is a handsome young man, who is always a second quicker than everyone else. He works at the post office, where Reika comes to buy a stamp every day. Reika is a young woman, who is always a second slower than everyone else. On the day after Valentine's Day, Hajime wakes up to find himself losing all his memories from the previous day... A remake of the Best Film Winner at the Taipei Golden Horse Awards, My Missing Valentine, and relocating the story to Kyoto, the film tells a quirky romance caught in unexpected time differences.

programme.title: WTA 26 Miami Open presented by Itau -SF(1)
E22
programme.desc: 《變成你的那一天》講述了頂流大明星江熠和女娛記者餘聲聲因為一次意外，身體和身份互換。兩人面對現狀只能相互指導，幫對方遮掩，因此發生了一系列逗趣搞笑的故事。

programme.title: E35
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E46
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E46
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E35
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: Phoenix Panorama
programme.desc: PHOENIX PANORAMA : To entertain, educate and inform audiences, Panoramic Eyeshot of Phoenix, a series of captivating and controversial documentaries, includes segments on current affairs, historical anniversaries and exclusive insider views on present developments.

programme.title: E162
programme.desc: “We Are One” uses a documentary shooting method, from the perspective of people, animals, and nature living in harmony, tells a touching story of cross-species, highlighting the noble sentiments of purity and kindness. As the sons of the earth, we are in harmony with nature, and all things coexist with love. From January 21, 2023, Phoenix Chinese Channel will launch a weekly documentary program of human and animals “We Are One” with a total duration of 26 minutes.

E22 - World Of Tomorrow
programme.desc: When a pair of crooks steal plans for a great new invention, there is a high-speed chase to try and get them back and allow them to prove their worth.

programme.title: E26 - Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: E27 - Musical Statues
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: E31 - The Stick Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels prepare for a campfire by collecting sticks of all sizes.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E44 - Whistler Mountain, Canada
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are on Whistler Mountain in Canada doing some skiing and checking out the amazing cable car which runs high up between the mountains.

programme.title: E20 - Peas
programme.desc: Two peas perform a happy song.

programme.title: E19 - Lemon
programme.desc: Lemon performs a stand-up routine!

programme.title: E29 - Operation Kiwi
programme.desc: Supertato, Carrot and Tomato are exploring in the plant aisle when they hear a strange noise. They follow the noise and meet the famous Kiwi the Explorer, who needs their help.

programme.title: E30 - Museum Mischief
programme.desc: Evil Pea pretends to help Supertato and Carrot train for crime prevention, but she tricks them and steals a mobile phone. Supertato and Carrot have a clever plan to get it back.

programme.title: E72 - Teddy Bear
programme.desc: Po finds a teddy bear in Teletubbyland. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa--Laa and Po excitedly show the teddy to the Tiddlytubbies and they all love it very much.

programme.title: E30 - Turtle Boy
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: E29 - Puppets
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: E17 - The World Record
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. 'If only we had more Duggee's' muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: E31 - Burger Shop
programme.desc: It's time for Bluey and Bingo to get out of the bath. But Dad has decided not to tell them what to do and gets roped into a game of Burger Shop.

programme.title: E4 - The Juice Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is going to make the squirrels juice from the garden. Whilst picking the fruit, the squirrels meet a little bug, full of woes about being too small.

programme.title: E3 - The Shape Badge
programme.desc: It is a lovely day and the squirrels are playing outside. They are playing the shape game. Working out which shape goes where is quite tricky.

programme.title: Cognizant Classic in The Palm Beaches
Cognizant Classic in The Palm Beaches
Cognizant Classic in The Palm Beaches
E3 - Choices
programme.desc: Learn how Ningaloo’s conservation miracle could inspire humans to pull the planet back from the brink of climatic destruction. Visit an abandoned whaling station and other ruins that show we have the tools, if only we can find the will to change.

programme.title: E1 - Tropical
programme.desc: Circle the equator for a look at the diverse species that dwell in tropical forests. Meet a lone sloth growing a mini-forest, lemurs that share and share alike, and elephants that tend to their woodland gardens. Then explore the region’s dark side.

programme.title: E2 - Seasonal
programme.desc: Watch the seasons wax and wane and learn how trees and animals help one another survive. Witness spring fireflies dancing after dark, discover summer fungi that cool off overheated trees, and prep for autumn migrations as the leaves begin to fall.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E2 - Jungle Love
programme.desc: It’s not easy to fall in love in the jungle. Find out how these animals turn to strategic mating strategies in order to pass on their genes. Meet monkeys who like monogamy, a bird who rivals Casanova, and a spider who’ll risk his life for love.

programme.title: E11 - South Africa
programme.desc: Wildebeest battle for herd hierarchy, meerkats live the thug life, floppy fish fight it out on land and locusts give up their vegetarian ways in a frenzy of cannibalism. It all happens on the wild and wide-open landscape of South Africa.

programme.title: E1 - Tropical

programme.title: E3 - A Life Among Trees
programme.desc: How many trees can you find in the Amazon? And what’s it like to live up in them? Travel through the canopy and see how more than 1200 species of trees coexist. Plus, follow monkeys and other creatures who call these trees home.

programme.title: E2 - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends including Charlotte, a schnauzer who enjoys bath time with her guinea pig pal Wallace, and a randy ram called Hamish who likes to sneak off to live with a herd of dairy cows instead of his own kind.

programme.title: E9 - Lisbon, Part 3
programme.desc: Michael's tackles a 700-year old stick-fighting marital art, witnesses divine illumination at a magnificent monastery, and discovers a chocolate cake with global ambitions.

programme.title: E3 - Machu Picchu - The Salkantay Trek
programme.desc: Ryan journeys deep into Peru along an ancient and remote footpath, where massive snow-capped mountains collide with lush tropical rain forests. The famous Salkantay Trek connects the city of Mollepata with Machu Picchu and passes Mount Salkantay, an outstanding glacier-capped summit.

programme.title: Section 375
programme.desc: A filmmaker stands trial when a costume assistant on his movie accuses him of rape.

programme.title: Darling (Why This Kolavari)

programme.title: Darling (Why This Kolavari)
programme.desc: Raghav's marriage plans are disrupted by his wife's multiple personalities. However, he grows through this experience, learns about love and finds unexpected joy in life.

programme.title: E6 - 陶喆愛徒登場
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E8 - 杜德偉驚喜加盟再唱《情人》
programme.desc: 在音樂主題上再度突破，以「一路為伍，向生綻放」為主題，甄選了貼近生活的歌曲和作品，用歌聲傳遞正能量；邀請了A-Lin、大張偉、庾澄慶、馬嘉祺、光良、蘇慧玲、任賢齊、陳卓璇、曾比特、白舉綱、吳莫愁等老、中、青三代歌手，在全新升級的「盲選配對」模式中組合獻唱，在代際傳承、時代交融中突破自我，打造一場最溫暖、最動人的音樂盛宴。

programme.title: E1 - 黎明李小鵬遭哄搶
programme.desc: 由黎明、林依晨、魏晨、謝依霖、鄭元暢、盛一倫、朱珠、李小鵬、王濛、潘曉婷、唐曉天、陳楚河共十二位明星和奧運冠軍參加，以輪換搭檔的形式，在全球十二座體育城市展開一系列競技PK。

programme.title: E7 - 劍擊隊美男子來徵婚
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E67
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.desc: Onggi originated on the Korean Peninsula, where agricultural culture flourished.

programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E216 - Fool's Paradise / Job Insecurity
programme.desc: With prankster Luan at camp for April Fool's Day, the Louds think they're safe. That is, until they break down in front of an unusual motel. // The kids discover Dad isn't at his IT job anymore and is now a dishwasher.

programme.title: E210 - Get Rod

programme.title: E8 - Hilary's The G.o.a.t.
programme.desc: A family with a dated home calls on Hilary to breathe new life into their old furniture, but construction delays force her to use all her creativity.

programme.title: E6 - Clarksville
programme.desc: Noah Cappe and chefs Jet Tila and Tiffani Faison explore the food scene in Clarksville, Tennessee. There, they sample pizza, pasta, BBQ, and cheesecake.

programme.title: E9 - Long Days Late Night Bbq Date
programme.desc: For her late-night date night with Nick, Molly Yeh makes her juicy steak party sub and scrumptious grilled potato salad with zhoung mayo.

programme.title: E10 - Cool Mom On The Go
programme.desc: Molly Yeh shares simple recipes to make life a little less complicated. She makes her Midwestern oatmeal cookie salads and a fluffy harissa potato chip frittata.

Bernoulli and Company
programme.desc: Eric learns how the Bernoulli Principle and playing with the flow of air can help him inflate a plastic bag. This same principle explains how airplanes fly, too.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... some Broccoli
programme.desc: Henry meets a head of Broccoli, and helps him get the shelves of the Greengrocer's stocked just in time for the shop opening.

programme.title: Testing Team Doki
programme.desc: Oto's proud of his driving skills, so when his RC car goes haywire in the middle of a race, he's sure it's the car's fault! Why did only Oto's car break? They set off to a toy design lab, hoping to solve the mystery of what went wrong with that one car!

programme.title: Bernoulli and Company
programme.desc: Eric learns how the Bernoulli Principle and playing with the flow of air can help him inflate a plastic bag. This same principle explains how airplanes fly, too.

programme.title: Bernoulli and Company
programme.desc: Eric learns how the Bernoulli Principle and playing with the flow of air can help him inflate a plastic bag. This same principle explains how airplanes fly, too.

programme.title: Trip to Bhutan
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo wish each other a happy New Year when Alim arrives and wishes them a happy birthday. Confused, they follow him to Bhutan, where their friend Dorji explains that in this Himalayan country, everyone turns a year older on New Year's Day.

programme.title: Surf's Up
programme.desc: Surf's up in Kiwifruit Valley, and Newts is determined to learn to surf like Heni. But one day the waves are huge and the next day they're gone and the kids have to figure out why.

programme.title: Tipsy Topsy Wobbling Crane
programme.desc: When a raging river moves the bridge, Darwin and Newts must learn about counterweights so they can build a crane to reach out and retrieve it.

programme.title: Fun with Pressure and Hydraulics
programme.desc: How come does a lift operate as a hydraulic system? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of pressure. Have hands-on fun by experimenting with leakages, and get to know Blaise Pascal, a polymath, who pioneered research into the hydrostatic principle.

programme.title: Dried Leaves
programme.desc: Autumn is here and it's cold, but do not worry! Hepi and Briko have just the activity for us to enjoy at home.

programme.title: Scooped!
programme.desc: When Addison and her classmates get a school assignment to write about local news – and the news is that laundry is going missing from balconies around Ayrton Park – Addison turns into investigative reporter to crack the case and get a scoop.

programme.title: An Eggplosion
programme.desc: One single egg has taken a completely wrong turning on its way to the fallopian tube. Sprinter and Leo discover that there is something strange with the egg but Bumble won't listen! It turns out that the egg is more of an explosive surprise from Boom!

programme.title: Seabirds
programme.desc: During the race, Kit and Mr. Battery will use the wings of various seabirds.

programme.title: The Undersea Cable
programme.desc: An internet malfunction leads Kit to a bitten data cable at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Game On
programme.desc: Sometimes Gabi takes winning way too seriously. Doki wonders - does Gabi really have to win, to have fun? To find out, they set off to the ‘One of a Kind Game Kingdom' at the Silly Sports Park in Japan, where the games are as goofy as they are unique.

programme.title: There's No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Bee is bored. Bored, bored, bored. The swarm are looking for a new place to set up their hive and it's turning out to be quite a long journey. Bee tries to keep himself amused but only manages to annoy the rest of the swarm.

programme.title: Monkey Magic
programme.desc: When LingLing's grandmother, Princess Iron Fan, is kidnapped by the Monkey King, she sets off to rescue her. Rose, Hawk, and the team join her quest. Can they handle the mighty Buffalo King, Vicky's tricks, and lots of screaming monkeys?

programme.title: Game On
programme.desc: Sometimes Gabi takes winning way too seriously. Doki wonders - does Gabi really have to win, to have fun? To find out, they set off to the ‘One of a Kind Game Kingdom' at the Silly Sports Park in Japan, where the games are as goofy as they are unique.

programme.title: Apple Pie
programme.desc: Telmo and Tula make a delicious apple pie with flour, salt, margarine, apples, sugar, and water.

programme.title: Seabirds
programme.desc: During the race, Kit and Mr. Battery will use the wings of various seabirds.

programme.title: The Undersea Cable
programme.desc: An internet malfunction leads Kit to a bitten data cable at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Trapped In Time
programme.desc: Naomi keeps repeating the same day over and over again, until she learns that her selfish attitude is what has caused her to be stuck in the loop.

programme.title: Food
programme.desc: Unlike life in our modern society, in the Middle Ages, people don't eat their fill every day. We follow our foodie Howler as he scavenges around for anything that takes his fancy, overstepping his mark as a mere peasant!

programme.title: Dashaun Morris: American Football Phenom
programme.desc: Dashaun Morris II holds the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for most one-handed mini-American football catches in one minute. He shares his love for American football with Will Munford and teaches him some excellent ball skills.

programme.title: What's Up with Water?
programme.desc: Eric does a magic trick that defies the laws of gravity. Then he learns how to make water flow upwards using a science experiment involving flowers and capillary action.

programme.title: Rules are Rules!
programme.desc: Dr. Xand has broken the rules and snuck a marble run into the lab. But will Dr. Chris notice during today's blood pressure experiment? Plus, there is a life-saving mission for the Flying Doctors in Australia.

programme.title: Fearless Junior Vets
programme.desc: The fearless Junior Vets get in the shark tank, and dogs Boris and Red have surgery to help them go walkies. And Jane, the grey seal, is in bad shape after swimming into some fishing wire.

programme.title: Mirror Mirror
programme.desc: When Darwin brings home a mirror, Kea sees her reflection and falls in love with her new friend.

programme.desc: Eric learns how the Bernoulli Principle and playing with the flow of air can help him inflate a plastic bag. This same principle explains how airplanes fly, too.

programme.title: What's Up with Water?
programme.desc: Eric does a magic trick that defies the laws of gravity. Then he learns how to make water flow upwards using a science experiment involving flowers and capillary action.

programme.title: Food
programme.desc: Unlike life in our modern society, in the Middle Ages, people don't eat their fill every day. We follow our foodie Howler as he scavenges around for anything that takes his fancy, overstepping his mark as a mere peasant!

programme.title: Fun with Pressure and Hydraulics
programme.desc: How come does a lift operate as a hydraulic system? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of pressure. Have hands-on fun by experimenting with leakages, and get to know Blaise Pascal, a polymath, who pioneered research into the hydrostatic principle.

programme.title: E10 - This Flippin' Guy
programme.desc: James butts heads when the competition, fellow flipper Rob, brings him a potential project: a split-level property with a massive yard in a prime neighbourhood. Rob's short on funds and full of confidence.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: With growing interest in nature-friendly interiors, today's homes are all about nature-friendly elements. We'll introduce you to the 'Smart House in Nature' and the extraordinary 'Eco-Friendly Open House'.

programme.title: E12 - Collard Green Dumplings & Apple Pie Potstickers
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares two dishes inspired by Chinese wontons: an all-American dish made with apple wontons and milk jam; and a collard green dumpling influenced by Southern cuisine.

programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares two dishes inspired by Chinese wontons: an all-American dish made with apple wontons and milk jam; and a collard green dumpling influenced by Southern cuisine.

programme.title: How Berliners Are Reshaping Their City For The Future
programme.desc: How creative citizen initiatives in Germany's capital are making the city more livable, and inspiring cities elsewhere. In Zambia, lead pollution from old mines is devastating the lives of those living there today.

programme.title: Astrosara - Training With Spain's First Female Astronaut
programme.desc: In Spain she's a media star. Known as AstroSara on YouTube, Sara Garcia Alonso is a science communicator, author, molecular biologist - and future ESA reserve astronaut. We accompany her as she prepares for the job.

programme.title: Russian Threats Everyday: How Estonian Border Guards Keep The Eu Safe
programme.desc: Rasmus is a young border guard working on Estonia's frontier with Russia, one of the most closely watched borders in Europe. We spent two days with Rasmus as we went on patrol across forests, a frozen lake and border villages to see how risks and security threats are managed here every day.

programme.desc: Moiraine struggles with uncertainty while Lan struggles with their new companion. Rand wonders about Mat and Mat starts to wonder at himself. Egwene and Perrin take their first steps down a different path. An incredible new power is unleashed on the world.

programme.title: E18 - After The Storm
programme.desc: When a trio of combat vets are found murdered in a D.C. motel room, NCIS tracks down a suspect who refuses to talk to anyone but Sam Hanna.

programme.title: E18 - After The Storm
programme.desc: When a trio of combat vets are found murdered in a D.C. motel room, NCIS tracks down a suspect who refuses to talk to anyone but Sam Hanna.

programme.title: E18 - After The Storm
programme.desc: When a trio of combat vets are found murdered in a D.C. motel room, NCIS tracks down a suspect who refuses to talk to anyone but Sam Hanna.

programme.title: E2 - When Friends Need a Hero!
programme.desc: Sometimes friends need a hero, & Buster is always ready to help! When he gets caught in a scary storm, he rushes to shelter, but then he spots his friend Scout, stuck in a muddy puddle! Buster has to muster all his courage to go back out & rescue her. But sometimes, even heroes need help! On another day, Buster gets stuck in the mud himself & has to be towed out by Terry Tractor. From stopping a runaway train to standing up to a bully, Buster is always there for his friends.

programme.title: E1 - At Home with Cody and His Family!
programme.desc: Spend a day at home with Cody & his family! Join Cody as he goes to work with his dad, Kwame, at the bakery, where they take on a huge muffin order & deliver them on time. Then, the kids get a special lesson in culture as Kwame introduces them to African instruments like the Balafon & Sangba drum. The day continues with Cody helping his dad cook delicious dishes from Ghana & ends with Mom & Dad comforting him after a bad dream.

programme.title: E5 - A Super Creative Day of Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E1 - Shapes, Songs & Story Time!
programme.desc: Join Ms. Appleberry & JJ for a learning adventure! Explore the letters B, C, R & U through fun activities. Play pretend as you make 'beep-beep' sounds on a bus & act like a playful pup. Sing along to classic songs, discover surprises inside the Melon Learning Box with a special guest & enjoy a rainy day adventure.

programme.title: E1 - A Barnyard Boogie with JJ!
programme.desc: Get ready for a barnyard boogie with JJ & his friends! The dance party kicks off on the farm with a fun rendition of the 'Yes, Yes Vegetable Song,' where all the animals come to dance. Then, it's time to wake up the little bunny friends with a merry tune & hop, march & skip around! Join the fun as the kids sing 'Old Macdonald,' ride a little green tractor to find their animal pals & search for five little ducks all over the farm. It's a day full of singing, dancing & farm fun!

programme.title: E1 - From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi is on an adventure from dinosaurs to pet knights! He travels back in time with Tabbs to help a little Microraptor prove that being small has its benefits when they rescue a giant sauropod from the mud. Then, they head to the African savannah to learn how to roar, sneak & pounce like a lion! Back at the clubhouse, Blippi learns how to interpret a puppy's tail wags & even travels back in time again to help a real-life knight in shining armor—who happens to be a corgi!

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E6 - Cat Ladies Lockup
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country. Two senior citizens get locked up for trespassing while trapping stray cats; a man is arrested after pouring milk on his head.

programme.title: E6 - Money, Murder And Malicious Intent
programme.desc: On his last day as an undercover agent, Bergen County Detective Carlos James experiences his first shootout, and ATF Agent Jenn Eskew poses as a hitwoman to investigate a possible murder for hire.

programme.desc: When a city official is gunned down in Berryville, shocked residents are left wondering who among them is a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: E15 - Jura, A Winter Of Emotions
programme.desc: The Jura massif offers a breathtaking panorama of the Swiss and French Alpine chain. Today, with climate change, this territory is undergoing a transformation.

programme.title: E23 - Let's Play And If You Changed
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place:2025-2026
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: E4 - Conduct Unbecoming
programme.desc: Nadia and Maxime defend a police officer accused of causing the death of a man in custody. Claire sees an unexpected client arrive at the office: her mother. Chloe finds a friend present on the evening of her accident and whose testimony could change the course of her trial.

programme.title: E1 - Herve Van Der Straeten/Alison Thirion
programme.desc: In the heart of the Marais district in Paris, the National Archives Museum hosts works dating back several centuries. French designer and architect Herve Van der Straeten opens the doors to his workshop. Style by Alessandro Michele for Valentino. We meet up with ceramic artist Alison Thirion.

NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: TV Patrol Live[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: What Lies Beaneath[Live]
programme.desc: After their best friend is killed, four high school friends lie to put a man in jail for the crime, but the lie comes back to haunt them years later when the man escapes prison and threatens their lives once more.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. The Sagrado family, a powerful political clan, faces moral dilemmas and scandals that threaten their reputation and unity. As secrets unravel, they must choose between protecting their name and staying true to their principles, all while navigating corruption, loyalty, and betrayal.

programme.title: With Or Without You
programme.desc: Police detective Ming loses his gun during a drunken binge and attempts to recover it while romancing PR girl Tweedy. That's the gist of the first two-thirds of the slackly-paced story, which is enlivened by a gun battle, a chase on foot through speeding cars, and comic relief provided by Ming's partner. Things really heat up, though, when Tweedy's old boyfriend Prince, a psychotic killer, comes back to town...

programme.title: Handsome Siblings
programme.desc: Master, The of Eva Palace enters the valley in search of 10 Untouchable Villians. Despite being married and having a child together, she and Yin fight each other without remorse.

programme.title: TGL Season 2 (2026) E17 -Atlanta Drive Golf Club vs Los Angeles Golf Club
E8 - Unfinished Business
programme.desc: With time running out, the team returns to Le Chameau for another attempt at its elusive stern. When a series of finds threatens to upend their plan, the team must make one final push.

programme.title: E9 - Graveyard Of The Atlantic
